## Description / 描述

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change / 更改类型

- [ ] Bug fix / 修复 bug
- [ ] New feature / 新功能
- [ ] Documentation update / 文档更新
- [ ] Refactoring / 代码重构
- [ ] CI / CD changes

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] Code compatible with Python 3.9+
- [ ] Tests pass locally / 本地测试通过
- [ ] README updated (if needed) / 已更新 README（如需要）
- [ ] Bilingual comments (Chinese + English) / 中英文双语注释
